baseline_description: TCDF run target-by-target through the official findcauses path with dataset-specific temporal context.

notes: The dataset stores adjacency as A[source, target]. For evaluation against the baseline outputs, the graph is transposed into target-by-source orientation.
fMRI latent mode uses the observed-only view with hidden indices [64, 65, 66, 67].
Observed variables are stored first and latent variables are stored last in the full sequence.
